content.speakerText: No extra charges—your card was only charged for the base rate.
content.speakerTextCn: 没有额外费用，只扣了基础租金。
expectedAnswers: That’s great to hear—I really appreciate it.
No extra fees? Sweet! Thanks for making this so smooth.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表达满意和感谢，未提出质疑
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：使用口语化但得体的表达，符合服务场景

expectedAnswers: Appreciate it! Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应祝福并回祝对方，完成礼貌道别
语言准确性：使用正确语法和常用短语
表达自然度：简洁自然，符合日常口语习惯

content.speakerText: Your payment has been processed successfully—no additional fees.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的付款已成功处理，无额外费用。
expectedAnswers: Perfect, thank you! Have a wonderful day!
That’s a relief—I’m so glad there weren’t any surprises. Thanks!
Great! I really appreciate your clear communication.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：确认费用无误并表达感谢，语气积极
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词和连接词，无语法错误
表达自然度：包含场景关键词（payment, fees, appreciate），语气真诚自然
